reviews.review_title: Awesome lil find - little buggy though
reviews.review_description:
I like the game, great little find for a cheap price. It's worth the current bucks (£5). However, I would love for the developers to work on fixing some of the bugs, like not seeing opponent's fishing docks and random crashes... 
Thank you for creating this little game, tho! I'd happily pay a higher price if fixed and a little more content is added (more classes/troops/buildings).

"There may be some rough edges, but Periculum is a neat little strategy game for a cheap price. It may not have as much depth as some of the bigger hitters, but the quickfire matches and map editor make this a worthy addition to your collection."
Not working, cant see the map. Tried to refund but was not possible! €%%#!!! Love the concept, but need to fix the game, also give back the money cuz game aint working
